description: This Java class 'SystemController' is a REST controller providing system-related endpoints such as health checks, documentation redirects, and application info for the backend API.

classes.name: SystemController
classes.description: A REST controller managing system endpoints such as health, documentation, and info.

methods.name: hello
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/' and returns a welcome message indicating the API is running.

methods.name: docs
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/docs' and redirects to Swagger UI, preserving the request scheme, host, and port.

methods.name: health
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/health' and returns the system health status.

methods.name: info
methods.description: Handles GET requests to '/api/info' and returns basic application information.
